title: BetterExplosives
description: This Texture Pack Gets Rid Of Explosions To Make your Crystal PvP Experience Much Better!
body:
# Why I Made This

Now, have you every been in a Crystal PvP Battle and you lost because more than half the fight you couldn't even see the player cause of the explosion crystal particles?

# What This Pack Adds

Now this texture pack removes any kind of explosive particle to make your game not only look cleaner and boost your fps but it will also help in PvP battles such as crystal pvp or TNT Minecart PvP because you will actually be able to see your enemy better.
